# HR Handbook

## Vacation Policy
- Full-time employees receive **20 paid vacation days per year**.
- Unused vacation days cannot be carried over to the next year.
- Requests must be submitted at least 2 weeks in advance in the HR portal.

## Public Holidays
The company observes 10 public holidays each year:
- New Year’s Day
- Independence Day
- Thanksgiving (Thu & Fri)
- Christmas (Dec 25)
- … (see HR portal for full list).

   If the reset link fails, contact the IT Helpdesk.

## Laptop Replacement Policy
- Standard replacement cycle: **every 3 years**.
- If your laptop is damaged, raise a ticket in the IT portal.
- Emergency replacement is possible if your device is non-functional.
- Returned laptops are securely wiped before recycling.

603e8270-6798-4aee-bdb6-1dec098238a9.text:
# Office Handbook

## Opening Hours
- Monday–Friday: **08:00–20:00**
- Weekends & holidays: Closed  
  Access outside normal hours requires manager approval.

## Badge Policy
- Always wear your badge visibly in the office.
- Lost badges must be reported immediately.
- Visitors receive temporary badges at reception.
- Sharing badges is strictly prohibited.

## Visitor Rules
- Visitors must be pre-registered in the Visitor System.

3deb1185-5a08-4235-8653-339f91922ec3.text:
## Parental Leave
- Primary caregivers: up to **16 weeks paid leave**.
- Secondary caregivers: up to **8 weeks paid leave**.
- Leave requests should be submitted at least 1 month in advance.
- Flexible return-to-work arrangements may be discussed with HR.

## Contact
- HR General: hr@company.com
- Emergency HR Hotline: +1 555-123-2000

772c6537-75a6-46b5-a1bb-d3151a2e2a71.text:
# Security Handbook

## Phishing Rules
- Never click suspicious links in emails.
- Report phishing attempts immediately via the *Report Phish* button in Outlook.
- IT will confirm within 24 hours if the email was malicious.

## Password Policy
- Minimum length: 12 characters.
- Must include upper & lower case, numbers, and symbols.
- Passwords expire every 90 days.
- Do not reuse old passwords.
- Multi-factor authentication (MFA) is mandatory.

527553af-1760-47d8-87a4-8c9e012bff54.text:
## Incident Contact
If you suspect a security incident:
1. Disconnect your device from the network.
2. Call the **Security Hotline** immediately: +1 555-123-5000.
3. Email: security@company.com (from a safe device).

The Security team operates 24/7.

## Training
- Mandatory annual security awareness training.
- Phishing simulations are conducted quarterly.

8a9a5d47-54e4-4e9f-98c9-d6b9459e37ae.text:
# Travel Handbook

## Booking Tool
- All business travel must be booked through the **Company Travel Portal**.
- Preferred airlines and hotels are automatically suggested.
- Bookings outside the system are not reimbursed.

## Per-Diem Limits
- Domestic travel: **$60/day**
- International travel: **$100/day**  
  This covers meals, transport, and incidentals.  
  Receipts are required for amounts above $25.
